title: croton nubigenus
intro: Croton nubigenus, also known as the cloud forest croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Croton nubigenus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Croton nubigenus are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
